title: AI Code Review
description: Paste a diff or code snippet to get an automated quality review

input.label: Diff / Code to review
input.placeholder:
Paste your git diff or code snippet here...

Example:
--- a/src/auth.py
+++ b/src/auth.py
@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@
 def login(username, password):
+    password = base64.b64decode(password)  // security issue
     user = db.query(username)
